ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: White Chocolate (90%) [Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Full Cream Milk Powder, Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin), Natural Vanilla Flavouring], Cookie Pieces (10%) [_Wheat Flour_, Sugar, Canola Oil, Cocoa Powder, Barley Malt Extract, Maize Glucose Syrup, Raising Agent (500), Salt].
